cooking_frenzy.lobby.welcome:
Welcome to Cooking Frenzy, a cooking-based
minigame where you fulfill customer orders
Check around the different tools you'll need to accomplish this.
cooking_frenzy.lobby.farming:
You may need to grow crops
to fullfill orders
cooking_frenzy.lobby.freezer:
Throw snowballs at targets
to get meat
cooking_frenzy.lobby.crafting:
You'll use different tools to make orders,
or have to buy ingredients at the shop
cooking_frenzy.lobby.customers:
Customers are the lifeblood of your business
Make sure they're well fed!
cooking_frenzy.tutorial.customer_arrived: Looks like a customer has arrived!
You should go take their order with Right Click!
Pay attention to the bar above their head, it displays how long you have until an Order expires.
The faster you clear an order, the more money you can get (up to 60)
cooking_frenzy.tutorial.freezer.outside: This is the freezer, you can get all kinds of meat from here.
cooking_frenzy.tutorial.freezer.target: Hit the target blocks with snowballs to gain meat
cooking_frenzy.tutorial.cook: Good job, now head to the stove to cook your food!
cooking_frenzy.tutorial.cook.additional: Cooking food takes time, so make sure to do things ahead of time!
cooking_frenzy.tutorial.farming.outside: This is the Farm, you can grow many crops here.
cooking_frenzy.tutorial.farming.go: Go to the farm and grab some wheat
cooking_frenzy.tutorial.farming.trader: You can buy seeds & other crops from the Trader. Make sure to get a hoe and some Wheat seeds!
cooking_frenzy.tutorial.farming.plant: Now go and plant your crops
cooking_frenzy.tutorial.farming.trader.b: You could wait for the crops to grow, but we're on a time crunch. Go get some bone meal at the farmer!
cooking_frenzy.tutorial.farming.finished: Good job! Now head on over to the crafter to make yourself some bread!
cooking_frenzy.tutorial.serve_order: Great, now you only need to give them their food by right clicking!
cooking_frenzy.tutorial.order_served: Good job! You're on your way to becoming an excelent cook!
cooking_frenzy.shop.queue_full: The Delivery Queue is currently full!
cooking_frenzy.upgrades.title: Select an upgrade
cooking_frenzy.upgrades.customer_waiting: Decreases the speed at which customers get angered while waiting to get their order taken by %s%%
cooking_frenzy.upgrades.customer_order_a: Decreases the speed at which customers get angered while waiting for their order to be done by %s%%
cooking_frenzy.upgrades.shop_queue.desc: Increase the shop delivery queue by 1
cooking_frenzy.upgrades.debt.desc: Allows you to go up to $50 in debt
cooking_frenzy.upgrades.freezer_max.desc: Increase the max amount of Snowballs to 10
cooking_frenzy.debuffs.title: Select a debuff
cooking_frenzy.debuffs.item_despawn_spee: Decrease the time it takes for an item to despawn by 10%%
Increases the price of all future upgrades by 10%%
cooking_frenzy.debuffs.random_shop_item_: A random shop item becomes 25%% more expensive
cooking_frenzy.debuffs.target_hit_precis: Increases how precise you have to be to hit the targets in the Freezer
cooking_frenzy.debuffs.freezer_damage.de: Take half a heart more damage in the freezer
cooking_frenzy.debuffs.shop_delivery_spe: Increases the Shop Delivery Time by 20%%
